name: Marco Rubio
subject: Welcome to Team Reclaim
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Reclaim America PAC
body:
Dear Peter,

Thank you for becoming part of Reclaim America.

I started Reclaim America to support conservative candidates
across the country that will come to Washington and make a real
difference.

This past November, because of the support of individuals like
you, we were able to elect a conservative majority to the United
States Senate that will help restore the American Dream.

What do I mean by the American Dream?

At its core, I believe the American Dream is about having the
opportunity to achieve happiness - happiness that comes from
being free to worship as you choose, find and keep a meaningful
and rewarding job, and pass your values and a better life onto
your children.

Sadly, many Americans feel like this Dream is no longer
attainable for people like them.

But we can change that with conservative reforms that empower the
American people to access the promise of our free market economy.
In order to make these reforms a reality, we first need a
conservative Senate.

To learn more about our efforts please visit the Reclaim America
website ->
www.reclaimamericapac.com/?utm_source=welcome&utm_medium=email

Proud to Stand,

Marco

Paid for by Reclaim America PAC.
Not Authorized by any candidate or
candidate's committee.
228 S. Washington Street Suite 115
Alexandria, VA 22314

www.reclaimamericapac.com

Contributions to Reclaim American PAC are not deductible as
charitable contributions for federal income tax purposes.

This message was intended for: dpwillis67@gmail.com
You were added to the system March 28, 2015.
For more information please follow the URL below:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/iW9nC2RAEN

Follow the URL below to update your preferences or opt-out:
http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/p/oW9nC2RAEN

To unsubscribe from future mailings, send an email to mailto:unsub-25713309409-echo3-8A6AEA875A3F44E7A390D781B7D9706D@emailsendr.net?Subject=Unsubscribe&body=Please%20remove%20me%20from%20further%20mailings
with "Unsubscribe" as the subject line.
